name: Raquel Clemons || House of Hound
description:
“Mama needs to destress.”

Raquel had been on her feet twelve hours straight at the women's correctional facility. After one of the new women on the line became mouthy with a correctional officer and locked the whole unit down, everything was delayed. The kitchen she prided herself in, ran late twice, and her staff needed her to pick up the pieces.

Normally, her shifts ended on time. Though all the same, she returned home with a dire need of routine with her claimed submissive. Hearing a “Hi, Mama” from her girl was enough.
